_readme: SCAFFOLDING ONLY — nothing on the site reads this file yet, and no points logic exists.
This documents the data shapes a future Mirr Rewards points system will need, so the
build is a fast flip when it's unblocked.
BLOCKED ON: Stripe Connect webhook integration. Mirr currently has no way to detect
that a purchase actually completed on a brand's site — shoppers leave via the Buy
button (see buyClick in brand-demo.html) and never come back with a receipt. Until a
webhook (e.g. checkout.session.completed / transfer.created on connected accounts)
reports real purchases, points cannot be awarded for anything.
The 'Join Mirr Rewards' capture on index.html (type=rewards-early-access in Formspree)
is live today and builds the launch list; it makes no earning promises.

purchase_event._description: Shape of a single detectable purchase, as a future Stripe Connect webhook handler would record it.

points_per_dollar._note: PLACEHOLDER — TBD. Business decision for the founders, not yet set. 1 point per AUD spent is a convention, not a commitment.

tiers.name: Founding
tiers._note: PLACEHOLDER — naming may conflict with the brand-side 'founding' tier in brands.json; resolve before launch.
